rationale: Review 1 wins because its finding is correct (the by `simp [...]` in fiberHomeomorph explicitly closes a non-trivial invariance goal via map_proj + Set lemmas and therefore relies on the ambient simp set), and changing it to `simp only` produces a strictly higher-quality, more stable proof per the rubric; Review 2's blanket approval therefore leaves a real maintainability defect untouched.
